@notice: Start Stripe subscription, Stripe prepaid, or Helio checkout; returns redirect URL.
Returns plan, watch limit, active watch count, and billing period for the session user.
Cron endpoint: run checks for all watches in `watching` status.
@dev: Vercel Cron invokes GET; POST kept for manual runs. Protected by
Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET when CRON_SECRET is set.

@notice: Batch check all active watches.
@return: 200 { ok, checked, triggered, errors, results } | 401 bad cron secret | 503 no Tavily

@notice: Manually run one check now for a watching watch (dev / dashboard "Check now").
@dev: Full pipeline: Tavily retrieve → filter → detect → decide → persist.

@notice: Run check for one watch owned by the user.
@return: 200 check summary with evidence | 404 | 409 non-watching | 503 no Tavily key

@notice: Get, pause/resume, or delete a single watch owned by the session user.
Finalize and persist a watch after the user has clarified a CLEAR sentence.
@dev: Re-runs vagueness on clarified text, compiles WatchSpec, inserts watch row.

@notice: Compile and save watch.
@return: 200 { watch } | 400 still VAGUE | 403 watch limit | 401 unauthorized

@notice: Assess vagueness of a watch sentence before saving (clarification step).
@dev: Does not persist a watch. Returns VaguenessResult for the WatchCreator UI.
Request body: raw_input 3–500 chars.

@notice: Run vagueness classification on raw_input.
@return: 200 VaguenessResult | 401 unauthorized | 400 validation error

@notice: Multi-step UI: enter sentence → clarify if vague → confirm and save watch.
@dev: Calls POST /api/watch/create for vagueness and POST /api/watch/confirm to persist.

@notice: Dashboard list of saved watches with pause, resume, delete, and check-now actions.
@dev: Client component; mutates via /api/watch/[id] PATCH and DELETE.

@notice: Scores compiler, detector, filter, decide, dialogues, and live Tavily retrieval against fixtures.
@dev: Run via `npm run eval` with flags: --compiler-only, --detector-only, --dialogues-only, --retrieval-only, --smoke.

@notice: Require an authenticated session and return the user id.
@dev: Throws "Unauthorized" — map to HTTP 401 in route catch blocks.
@return: Session user id string.

@notice: Auth.js setup with Drizzle adapter and Postgres user/session tables.
@dev: Exports handlers, auth, signIn, signOut. Schema ensure starts at module load.

@notice: Called when Plus expires so free users retain their 3 most recently created active watches.
@param: userId User whose excess watches should be paused.
@return: Summary of watches that were paused.

untagged: Pause newest active watches until the user is at or under the free-tier cap.

@notice: Resolves effective plan, watch limits, and Plus grant/revoke for a user.
@dev: Plus is active for subscription (until period end) or prepaid (until planPeriodEnd).
Subscription stays active without period end; prepaid requires future planPeriodEnd.

@notice: Runs one full retrieval → filter → detect → decide cycle for a single watch.
@dev: Phase 1+2 bridge. Persists check and evidence rows; updates watch status on notification.
@custom:pipeline: step 5 — check (orchestrates retrieve, filter, detect, decide)

@dev: Cap on candidates sent to the detector per check to control latency and inference cost.
Summary returned to API routes and cron after a check completes.

@notice: Execute a scheduled or manual check for one watch.
@dev: Skips already-seen URLs, evaluates up to MAX_CANDIDATES_TO_EVALUATE survivors, marks watch triggered when decision says notify.
@return: CheckRunResult with persisted check id and decision summary.

@notice: Records each check run and per-source evidence for audit trails and URL deduplication.
@dev: Phase 2. Confidence stored as 0–100 integer; evidence snippets truncated at insert.
Input for inserting one check row after decide completes.
One evidence row linked to a check (one evaluated URL).

@notice: Insert a check record and return its id.
@dev: Id format: `chk_<uuid12>`. Confidence clamped to [0,1] then stored as percent.
@return: New check id.

@notice: Bulk-insert evidence rows for a check.
@param: checkId Parent check id from createCheck.

@notice: Normalized URLs previously stored as evidence for any check on this watch.
@dev: Used by applyRetrievalFilters to skip re-judging the same article.
@return: Set of normalized URLs.

@notice: Turns a plain-language watch sentence into a structured WatchSpec, with a vagueness gate first.
@dev: Phase 1 judgment layer. Uses Hugging Face chat completion via `completeJson` with strict system prompts.
System prompt for the vagueness classifier. Conservative: prefers VAGUE when unsure.
System prompt for WatchSpec body generation (trigger/non-trigger conditions, queries, domains).
Zod subset of WatchSpec fields the model is allowed to produce (metadata added in code).

@notice: Classify whether a watch sentence is specific enough to monitor.
@dev: First step in watch creation. Returns VAGUE with suggested concrete alternatives when rejected.
@param: rawInput User's watch sentence (3–500 chars at API layer).
@return: VaguenessResult with CLEAR or VAGUE classification.

@notice: Compile a cleared watch sentence into a full WatchSpec ready for persistence.
@dev: Assigns id, user_id, created_at, check_frequency, and status unless overridden in options.
@param: rawInput Original user input (preserved on the spec).
options.clarifiedStatement Final unambiguous statement after clarification.
options.createdAt ISO timestamp anchoring the post-watch-only filter.
@return: Validated WatchSpec.

@notice: Combined vagueness check and compile for eval harness and smoke tests.
@dev: Skips compilation when classification is VAGUE.
@param: createdAt Fixed timestamp for reproducible eval runs.
@return: Vagueness result and optional compiled spec.

@notice: Tier limits and billing amounts shared across entitlements and UI.
@dev: Single source of truth for free vs plus watch caps and prepaid period length.
Prepaid Helio period duration in milliseconds (30 days).
Days-before-expiry offsets for prepaid renewal reminder emails.

@notice: Drizzle client over Neon's serverless HTTP driver, plus idempotent schema ensure.
@dev: Requires DATABASE_URL (Neon). Call await initDb() before first API use.

@notice: Create tables if missing (safe on every cron/API cold start).
@dev: Idempotent; concurrent callers share one in-flight init.

@notice: Table definitions for auth, billing, watches, checks, and evidence.
@dev: WatchSpec stored as JSONB on watches.spec. NextAuth adapter tables follow Auth.js conventions.
Stripe or Helio subscription/prepaid records linked to user.
Idempotent webhook event log (provider + event id) for Stripe and Helio.
OAuth provider accounts (NextAuth adapter).
Active login sessions (NextAuth adapter).
Email magic-link tokens (NextAuth adapter).
One scheduled or manual check run against a watch.
Per-URL judgment stored for a check (audit trail for notifications).

@notice: Aggregates per-source detection verdicts and decides whether to notify the user.
@dev: Phase 1 judgment layer. Implements corroboration: authoritative high-confidence OR two independent triggers.
Minimum confidence from an authoritative domain required for solo-trigger notification.
One retrieval candidate paired with its detection result.
Final outcome of the decide step for a single check run.
True when domain matches an entry in spec.authoritative_domains (supports subdomains).
@param: spec Watch spec with authoritative_domains list.

@notice: Decide whether evidence from a check warrants user notification.
@dev: Notification paths: (1) authoritative source ≥0.75 confidence TRIGGERED, or (2) ≥2 TRIGGERED from distinct domains.
Single non-authoritative trigger sets needs_corroboration without notifying.
@param: spec Watch spec (for authoritative domain list).
evidence Filtered candidates with detection results from this check.
@return: DecideResult with should_notify, top verdict, and human-readable reasoning.

@notice: Judges whether a single web source shows the watched event actually occurred.
@dev: Phase 1 judgment layer. Not keyword matching — requires credible evidence of the event post-watch.
System prompt for per-candidate TRIGGERED / NOT_TRIGGERED / AMBIGUOUS classification.

@notice: Run detection for one retrieval candidate against a WatchSpec.
@dev: Includes trigger/non-trigger conditions and watch creation timestamp in the user prompt.
@param: candidate Filtered web source to evaluate.
@return: DetectionResult plus the HF model id used for this call.

@notice: Drops candidates that are too old, already evaluated, or on a denylist before detection.
@dev: Phase 1 judgment layer. Enforces the post-watch-only rule central to PhraseAlert's value prop.

@notice: Canonicalize a URL for deduplication across check runs.
@dev: Strips hash fragments and trailing slashes. Invalid URLs pass through unchanged.
@return: Normalized URL string.

@notice: True when the source was published on or after the watch was created.
@dev: Pre-watch articles (guides, old news) must not trigger alerts.
@param: watchCreatedAt ISO datetime from watch creation.

@notice: Apply post-watch, dedup, and domain deny filters to a candidate list.
@dev: Called after Tavily retrieval and before detection. Order preserved from input.
@param: watchCreatedAt Watch creation timestamp for temporal filter.
seenUrls Normalized URLs from prior checks on this watch (default empty).
@return: Filtered candidates eligible for detection.

@notice: Shared LLM completion layer for compiler, detector, and eval harness.

Default instruct model when HF_MODEL is unset.
Models supported for eval comparison runs.
Lazy singleton InferenceClient; throws if HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY missing.

@notice: Resolve the active model id from env or default.
@return: Model string passed to chatCompletion.

@notice: Run a chat completion and parse the assistant message as JSON.
@dev: temperature 0.1, max_tokens 1200. Use Zod schemas on `parsed` at call sites.
@param: userPrompt User role content (watch text, candidate source, etc.).
@return: Raw text, parsed JSON, and model id.

@notice: Extract JSON from model output, including fenced ```json blocks.

@return: Parsed value cast to T (caller should validate with Zod).

Top unique URLs sent to Tavily extract for richer snippets.
Parallel Tavily search calls (one per search_query).
Hostname without www prefix; "unknown" on parse failure.
Normalize Tavily published_date to ISO; falls back to retrievedAt when missing or invalid.
YYYY-MM-DD slice of watch created_at for Tavily start_date filter.
Bounded-concurrency map for parallel Tavily searches.
Collapse whitespace and cap snippet length for detector prompts.

@return: Deduplicated candidates ready for applyRetrievalFilters.

opts query + chunksPerSource for relevance-focused excerpts.

List all watches for a user, newest first.
Fetch one watch scoped to owner.

@notice: All watches in `watching` status — used by the cron check runner.

@notice: Shared Zod schemas and TypeScript types for watches, detection, retrieval, and eval fixtures.
@dev: All runtime validation flows through these schemas. API routes and the judgment pipeline import from here.

@notice: Structured specification produced when a user's sentence is compiled into a monitorable watch.

@notice: Outcome of the vagueness gate before a watch can be saved.
@dev: CLEAR proceeds to compilation; VAGUE returns up to three concrete alternative sentences.

@notice: Per-source judgment on whether credible evidence shows the watched event occurred.
@dev: TRIGGERED does not alone imply notification — `decideFromEvidence` applies corroboration rules.

@notice: A web page (or fixture) candidate passed to the detector after retrieval and filtering.
